training_yard.description: Fighters train here, improving combat readiness.
training_yard.assigned_bonus: Each assigned Fighter adds +1 to party attack strength on expeditions.
training_yard.retire_bonus: All parties gain +2 attack strength permanently.

shrine.description: Clerics tend the wounded, speeding recovery.
shrine.assigned_bonus: Each assigned Cleric adds +1 HP/day healing for all adventurers.
shrine.retire_bonus: One resurrection per expedition — a fallen adventurer may be saved.

arcane_tower.description: Magic-Users research here, unlocking arcane knowledge.
arcane_tower.assigned_bonus: Each assigned Magic-User adds +5% XP earned on expeditions.
arcane_tower.retire_bonus: Parties can cast Identify on treasure — doubles special item chance.

rangers_lodge.description: Elves scout ahead, increasing the chance of finding stairs.
rangers_lodge.assigned_bonus: Each assigned Elf adds +2% stairs discovery chance on expeditions.
rangers_lodge.retire_bonus: Parties always find stairs if they exist — guaranteed discovery.

workshop.description: Dwarves forge equipment, boosting loot and durability.
workshop.assigned_bonus: Each assigned Dwarf adds +10% loot found on expeditions.
workshop.retire_bonus: All adventurers gain +2 max HP from masterwork equipment.

tavern.description: Hobbits run the tavern, attracting more recruits.
tavern.assigned_bonus: Each assigned Hobbit adds +1% daily recruitment chance per class.
tavern.retire_bonus: Max tavern size increases to 30. Recruits may arrive at level 2.
